species: the results showed that, in contrast to Gly-GFP fusion protein, neither Ser-GFP fusion nor Ala-GFP fusion was destabilized upon overexpression of exogenous ZER1 in HEK293T cells.
sample_source: the results showed that, in contrast to Gly-GFP fusion protein, neither Ser-GFP fusion nor Ala-GFP fusion was destabilized upon overexpression of exogenous ZER1 in HEK293T cells.
